meeting_summary.context: Acme Corp is a $1.2M ARR mid-market SaaS customer approaching a 90-day renewal window (exp. ~July 2026). The account shows high usage growth but significant executive-level friction and support breaches.
meeting_summary.headline: High-Stakes Renewal: Defensive Alignment Against Pricing Pressure and Technical Dissatisfaction
meeting_summary.participant_snapshot: Key attendees include Elena Rodriguez (CFO, driving pricing pressure), Marcus Webb (CTO, witness to SLA breaches), and Sarah Chen (VP Data/Champion).

risks.mitigation: Proactively admit that while the average resolution is 18h, the recent P1s (which Marcus saw) took 48h. Do not present Slide 5 without this verbal disclaimer to avoid appearing deceptive.
Frame the '3-year renewal' (Slide 7) as a solution to Elena's request for 'multi-year pricing flexibility' to secure the $1.2M ARR floor before she pushes for usage-based models.
Connect the 'H1 2026 Roadmap' (Slide 6) specifically to their expansion into EMEA and healthcare clients, making the switching cost higher than a simple pricing play by Competitor X.
The Account Manager must provide a firm date for the 'Custom data export format' quote during the meeting, as this is the third time Sarah has requested it.

talking_points.why_it_lands: Elena Rodriguez (CFO) will appreciate that MAU is up 12% even after Feb layoffs; this proves the tool provides ROI by automating work for a smaller team.
Marcus Webb (CTO) requires 'Multi-region data residency' to support the EMEA business unit expansion they are planning.
For Dev Patel: 'With the recent team changes, how can our roadmap for Native LLM integration (Slide 6) act as a force-multiplier for your remaining data scientists?'

next_steps.action: Deliver formal quote for Custom Data Export Format
Verify SOC 2 Type II status for healthcare client requirement

cover_image_prompt: A professional corporate dashboard showing a '38% growth' line chart and a '2.4x ROI' badge, set against a background of a modern glass-walled boardroom in navy and gold tones.
